data.has_feedbackmodule: Feedback Module (05-207) installed and connected via PC-Link

data_description.has_feedbackmodule: When enabled, the Feedback Module pushes state changes automatically — no polling needed.
data_description.prior_gen3: Enables compatibility tweaks for first and second-generation PC-Link hardware.

hardware.description: Tell us about your Nikobus hardware so the integration can use the optimal update strategy.
hardware.title: Hardware Configuration

data_description.refresh_interval: How often to read module states from the bus (60–3600 s). Lower values mean faster updates but more bus traffic.

polling.description: Without a Feedback Module, Home Assistant polls the Nikobus bus periodically. Choose how often.
polling.title: Polling Interval

data_description.connection_string: Serial device path or TCP address of the PC-Link bridge

reconfigure.description: Update the connection string or hardware settings. The connection will be re-tested.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Nikobus

data_description.connection_string: Serial device path or TCP address of the PC-Link bridge

user.description:
Enter the address of your Nikobus PC-Link module.

- **Serial port**: `/dev/ttyUSB0` or `COM3`
- **Network bridge**: `192.168.1.50:9999`
user.title: Connect to Nikobus

confirm.title: Discover Nikobus modules and buttons
confirm.description: Home Assistant has not detected any Nikobus buttons. Run a PC-Link inventory discovery now to populate the configuration.

discovery_already_running.message: A Nikobus discovery is already running.

no_loaded_entry.message: No loaded Nikobus integration found. Set one up before calling this action.

abort.discovery_done: Discovery finished. The integration is reloading and the newly-discovered entities will appear shortly.
abort.not_loaded: The Nikobus integration is not loaded. Please reload the integration and try again.
